# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Build and Notification Workflow

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened, edited]
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
      - 'release/**'

env:
  PR_TITLE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
  PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
  PR_AUTHOR: ${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}
  PR_URL: ${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}
  PR_BRANCH: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.ref }}
  PR_BASE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.base.ref }}

jobs:
  extract-pr-metadata:
    name: Extract PR Metadata
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      pr_title: ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.pr_title }}
      pr_description: ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.pr_description }}
      pr_number: ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.pr_number }}
      pr_author: ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.pr_author }}
      pr_labels: ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.pr_labels }}
      pr_url: ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.pr_url }}
      release_category: ${{ steps.categorize.outputs.category }}
      sanitized_title: ${{ steps.metadata.outputs.sanitized_title }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Extract PR metadata
        id: metadata
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const pr = context.payload.pull_request;

            const title = pr.title || 'No title provided';
            const description = pr.body || 'No description provided';
            const number = pr.number;
            const author = pr.user.login;
            const labels = pr.labels.map(l => l.name).join(', ');
            const url = pr.html_url;

            // Sanitize title for use in commit messages (remove special chars)
            const sanitizedTitle = title.replace(/[^\w\s\-\.\(\)\[\]\/]/g, '').trim();

            core.setOutput('pr_title', title);
            core.setOutput('pr_description', description);
            core.setOutput('pr_number', number.toString());
            core.setOutput('pr_author', author);
            core.setOutput('pr_labels', labels);
            core.setOutput('pr_url', url);
            core.setOutput('sanitized_title', sanitizedTitle);

            core.summary
              .addHeading('PR Metadata Extracted', 2)
              .addTable([
                [{data: 'Field', header: true}, {data: 'Value', header: true}],
                ['Title', title],
                ['Number', `#${number}`],
                ['Author', author],
                ['Labels', labels || 'None'],
                ['Base Branch', pr.base.ref],
                ['Head Branch', pr.head.ref]
              ])
              .write();

      - name: Categorize PR for release notes
        id: categorize
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const title = '${{ steps.metadata.outputs.pr_title }}'.toLowerCase();
            const labels = '${{ steps.metadata.outputs.pr_labels }}'.toLowerCase();

            let category = 'other';

            if (title.startsWith('feat') || labels.includes('feature') || labels.includes('enhancement')) {
              category = 'feature';
            } else if (title.startsWith('fix') || labels.includes('bug') || labels.includes('bugfix')) {
              category = 'bugfix';
            } else if (title.startsWith('docs') || labels.includes('documentation')) {
              category = 'documentation';
            } else if (title.startsWith('chore') || labels.includes('chore') || labels.includes('maintenance')) {
              category = 'maintenance';
            } else if (title.startsWith('refactor') || labels.includes('refactor')) {
              category = 'refactor';
            } else if (title.startsWith('perf') || labels.includes('performance')) {
              category = 'performance';
            } else if (title.startsWith('test') || labels.includes('test')) {
              category = 'testing';
            } else if (title.startsWith('ci') || labels.includes('ci')) {
              category = 'ci';
            } else if (title.startsWith('breaking') || labels.includes('breaking')) {
              category = 'breaking';
            }

            core.setOutput('category', category);
            console.log(`PR categorized as: ${category}`);

  build:
    name: "Build: PR #${{ github.event.pull_request.number }} - ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}"
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: extract-pr-metadata
    outputs:
      build_status: ${{ steps.build.outputs.status }}
      build_duration: ${{ steps.build.outputs.duration }}
      artifact_name: ${{ steps.build.outputs.artifact_name }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}

      - name: Set up build environment
        run: |
          echo "=================================================="
          echo "Building PR #${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }}"
          echo "Title: ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_title }}"
          echo "Author: ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_author }}"
          echo "Category: ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.release_category }}"
          echo "=================================================="

      - name: Configure Git with PR context
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          echo "COMMIT_MSG=build: PR #${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }} - ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.sanitized_title }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Run build
        id: build
        run: |
          BUILD_START=$(date +%s)

          echo "Running build for: ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_title }}"

          ARTIFACT_NAME="build-pr-${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }}-$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)"

          # Create build info file for release tracking
          mkdir -p build-output
          cat > build-output/build-info.json << 'BUILDEOF'
          {
            "pr_number": ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }},
            "pr_title": "${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.sanitized_title }}",
            "pr_author": "${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_author }}",
            "pr_url": "${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_url }}",
            "release_category": "${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.release_category }}",
            "commit_sha": "${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}",
            "base_branch": "${{ github.event.pull_request.base.ref }}",
            "build_timestamp": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
            "artifact_name": "ARTIFACT_PLACEHOLDER"
          }
          BUILDEOF

          sed -i "s|ARTIFACT_PLACEHOLDER|${ARTIFACT_NAME}|g" build-output/build-info.json

          # Simulate actual build steps
          echo "Compiling..."
          echo "Running unit tests..."
          echo "Packaging..."

          BUILD_END=$(date +%s)
          BUILD_DURATION=$((BUILD_END - BUILD_START))

          echo "status=success" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "duration=${BUILD_DURATION}s" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "artifact_name=${ARTIFACT_NAME}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Upload build artifact with PR context
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ steps.build.outputs.artifact_name }}
          path: build-output/
          retention-days: 14

      - name: Generate build summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "## Build Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Field | Value |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "|-------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **PR** | #${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Title** | ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_title }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Author** | @${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_author }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Category** | ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.release_category }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Status** | ${{ steps.build.outputs.status }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Duration** | ${{ steps.build.outputs.duration }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Artifact** | ${{ steps.build.outputs.artifact_name }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY

  update-release-notes-draft:
    name: Update Release Notes Draft
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [extract-pr-metadata, build]
    if: needs.build.outputs.build_status == 'success'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Append to release notes tracking
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const prNumber = ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }};
            const prTitle = `${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.sanitized_title }}`;
            const prAuthor = '${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_author }}';
            const prUrl = '${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_url }}';
            const category = '${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.release_category }}';

            const categoryEmojis = {
              'feature': '✨',
              'bugfix': '🐛',
              'documentation': '📚',
              'maintenance': '🔧',
              'refactor': '♻️',
              'performance': '⚡',
              'testing': '🧪',
              'ci': '👷',
              'breaking': '💥',
              'other': '📦'
            };

            const emoji = categoryEmojis[category] || '📦';
            const releaseEntry = `${emoji} ${prTitle} (#${prNumber}) by @${prAuthor}`;

            console.log(`Release note entry: ${releaseEntry}`);
            console.log(`Category: ${category}`);
            console.log(`PR URL: ${prUrl}`);

            // Add a comment on the PR with build and release tracking info
            const commentBody = [
              '## 🏗️ Build & Release Tracking',
              '',
              '| Field | Value |',
              '|-------|-------|',
              `| **Build Status** | ✅ Success |`,
              `| **Release Category** | ${emoji} ${category} |`,
              `| **Release Note Entry** | ${releaseEntry} |`,
              `| **Artifact** | \`${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact_name }}\` |`,
              `| **Build Duration** | ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_duration }} |`,
              '',
              '> This PR will be included in the next release notes under the **' + category + '** section.',
            ].join('\n');

            // Find and update existing bot comment or create new one
            const comments = await github.rest.issues.listComments({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              issue_number: prNumber
            });

            const botComment = comments.data.find(
              c => c.user.type === 'Bot' && c.body.includes('Build & Release Tracking')
            );

            if (botComment) {
              await github.rest.issues.updateComment({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                comment_id: botComment.id,
                body: commentBody
              });
              console.log('Updated existing build tracking comment');
            } else {
              await github.rest.issues.createComment({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                issue_number: prNumber,
                body: commentBody
              });
              console.log('Created new build tracking comment');
            }

  notify-slack:
    name: Slack Notification
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [extract-pr-metadata, build]
    if: always()
    steps:
      - name: Prepare Slack notification payload
        id: slack_payload
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const buildStatus = '${{ needs.build.outputs.build_status }}' || 'failure';
            const prTitle = `${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.sanitized_title }}`;
            const prNumber = '${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }}';
            const prAuthor = '${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_author }}';
            const prUrl = '${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_url }}';
            const category = '${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.release_category }}';
            const buildDuration = '${{ needs.build.outputs.build_duration }}' || 'N/A';
            const description = `${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_description }}`.substring(0, 200);

            const statusEmoji = buildStatus === 'success' ? '✅' : '❌';
            const statusText = buildStatus === 'success' ? 'succeeded' : 'failed';
            const color = buildStatus === 'success' ? '#36a64f' : '#dc3545';

            const payload = {
              attachments: [
                {
                  color: color,
                  blocks: [
                    {
                      type: "header",
                      text: {
                        type: "plain_text",
                        text: `${statusEmoji} PR Build ${statusText}: #${prNumber}`,
                        emoji: true
                      }
                    },
                    {
                      type: "section",
                      fields: [
                        {
                          type: "mrkdwn",
                          text: `*PR Title:*\n${prTitle}`
                        },
                        {
                          type: "mrkdwn",
                          text: `*Author:*\n${prAuthor}`
                        },
                        {
                          type: "mrkdwn",
                          text: `*Category:*\n${category}`
                        },
                        {
                          type: "mrkdwn",
                          text: `*Build Duration:*\n${buildDuration}`
                        }
                      ]
                    },
                    {
                      type: "section",
                      text: {
                        type: "mrkdwn",
                        text: `*Description:*\n${description}${description.length >= 200 ? '...' : ''}`
                      }
                    },
                    {
                      type: "actions",
                      elements: [
                        {
                          type: "button",
                          text: {
                            type: "plain_text",
                            text: "View PR"
                          },
                          url: prUrl
                        },
                        {
                          type: "button",
                          text: {
                            type: "plain_text",
                            text: "View Build"
                          },
                          url: `${process.env.GITHUB_SERVER_URL}/${process.env.GITHUB_REPOSITORY}/actions/runs/${process.env.GITHUB_RUN_ID}`
                        }
                      ]
                    }
                  ]
                }
              ]
            };

            core.setOutput('payload', JSON.stringify(payload));

      - name: Send Slack notification
        if: env.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL != ''
        env:
          SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}
        run: |
          curl -X POST \
            -H 'Content-type: application/json' \
            --data '${{ steps.slack_payload.outputs.payload }}' \
            "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" || echo "Slack notification failed (webhook may not be configured)"

      - name: Log notification details
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "========================================="
          echo "Build Notification Summary"
          echo "========================================="
          echo "PR #${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }}: ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_title }}"
          echo "Author: ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_author }}"
          echo "Category: ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.release_category }}"
          echo "Build Status: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_status }}"
          echo "Build Duration: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_duration }}"
          echo "Artifact: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact_name }}"
          echo "========================================="

  notify-teams:
    name: Microsoft Teams Notification
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [extract-pr-metadata, build]
    if: always()
    steps:
      - name: Prepare Teams notification
        id: teams_payload
        run: |
          BUILD_STATUS="${{ needs.build.outputs.build_status }}"
          if [ "$BUILD_STATUS" = "success" ]; then
            THEME_COLOR="00FF00"
            STATUS_TEXT="✅ Build Succeeded"
          else
            THEME_COLOR="FF0000"
            STATUS_TEXT="❌ Build Failed"
          fi

          cat > teams-payload.json << EOF
          {
            "@type": "MessageCard",
            "@context": "http://schema.org/extensions",
            "themeColor": "${THEME_COLOR}",
            "summary": "PR #${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }} - ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.sanitized_title }}",
            "sections": [{
              "activityTitle": "${STATUS_TEXT}",
              "activitySubtitle": "PR #${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }} by @${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_author }}",
              "facts": [
                { "name": "PR Title", "value": "${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.sanitized_title }}" },
                { "name": "Release Category", "value": "${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.release_category }}" },
                { "name": "Build Duration", "value": "${{ needs.build.outputs.build_duration }}" },
                { "name": "Target Branch", "value": "${{ github.event.pull_request.base.ref }}" },
                { "name": "Artifact", "value": "${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact_name }}" }
              ],
              "markdown": true
            }],
            "potentialAction": [
              {
                "@type": "OpenUri",
                "name": "View Pull Request",
                "targets": [{ "os": "default", "uri": "${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_url }}" }]
              },
              {
                "@type": "OpenUri",
                "name": "View Build",
                "targets": [{ "os": "default", "uri": "${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}" }]
              }
            ]
          }
          EOF

          cat teams-payload.json

      - name: Send Teams notification
        if: env.TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL != ''
        env:
          TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL }}
        run: |
          curl -X POST \
            -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
            -d @teams-payload.json \
            "$TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL" || echo "Teams notification failed (webhook may not be configured)"

  generate-release-entry:
    name: Generate Release Notes Entry
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [extract-pr-metadata, build]
    if: needs.build.outputs.build_status == 'success'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Generate release notes entry artifact
        run: |
          mkdir -p release-notes-entries

          CATEGORY="${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.release_category }}"
          PR_NUMBER="${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }}"
          PR_TITLE="${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.sanitized_title }}"
          PR_AUTHOR="${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_author }}"
          PR_URL="${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_url }}"
          PR_DESCRIPTION=$(cat << 'DESCEOF'
          ${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_description }}
          DESCEOF
          )

          cat > release-notes-entries/pr-${PR_NUMBER}.json << EOF
          {
            "pr_number": ${PR_NUMBER},
            "title": "${PR_TITLE}",
            "author": "${PR_AUTHOR}",
            "url": "${PR_URL}",
            "category": "${CATEGORY}",
            "base_branch": "${{ github.event.pull_request.base.ref }}",
            "head_branch": "${{ github.event.pull_request.head.ref }}",
            "commit_sha": "${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}",
            "labels": "${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_labels }}",
            "build_artifact": "${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact_name }}",
            "timestamp": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
          }
          EOF

          # Generate markdown entry
          cat > release-notes-entries/pr-${PR_NUMBER}.md << EOF
          ### ${PR_TITLE} (#${PR_NUMBER})

          **Category:** ${CATEGORY}
          **Author:** @${PR_AUTHOR}

          ${PR_DESCRIPTION}

          ---
          EOF

          echo "Generated release notes entry for PR #${PR_NUMBER}"
          echo ""
          echo "JSON entry:"
          cat release-notes-entries/pr-${PR_NUMBER}.json
          echo ""
          echo "Markdown entry:"
          cat release-notes-entries/pr-${PR_NUMBER}.md

      - name: Upload release notes entry
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: release-note-pr-${{ needs.extract-pr-metadata.outputs.pr_number }}
          path: release-notes-entries/
          retention-days: 90
